---
title: Business Case
author:
  - Luis Francisco Gomez
  - Bill Gates
  - Norah Jones
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: load-r-libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(sweep)
```

# Introduction

In this report we are going to explore the data set.

# Exploring data set

First, we are going to count the different models in the data set.

## Counting

```{r}
count_model <- bike_sales |> 
  count(
    model,
    sort = TRUE
  )

count_model
```
